reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion del playero que no solo cumplió con su trabajo con eficiencia y profesionalidad sino con mucha buena onda y predisposicion, respondiendo nuestras preguntas sobre aspectos turísticos de la ciudad.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach attendant who not only performed his job efficiently and professionally but also with great friendliness and willingness, answering our questions about tourist aspects of the city.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5MEp1ZlFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Baños sucios mal. Seguimos de largo. A lo sumo para cargar combustible y seguir.

(Translated by Google)
Dirty bathrooms. We kept going. At most, we stopped to refuel and continue.

reviews.comment:
MUY LENTA LA ATENCION PORQUE HAY POQUISIMO PERSONAL ...JAMAS!!! ANDA EL AIRE PARA LOS NEUMATICOS. POCAS VECES ANDA EL APP DE YPF..SIEMPRE LA ESCUSA DE LA RED Y EL DESCUENTO NO APARECE.

(Translated by Google)
SERVICE IS VERY SLOW BECAUSE THERE ARE VERY FEW STAFF...NEVER!!! THE AIR WORKS FOR THE TIRES. THE YPF APP RARELY WORKS...ALWAYS THE EXCUSE OF THE NETWORK AND THE DISCOUNT DOESN'T APPEAR.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTejl2b1FnEAE

reviews.comment:
